goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alexander bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 10:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '2 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alexander bed and breakfast
Make sure you get star of the hotel and hotel type
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should leave on tuesday
The train should arrive by 10:15 and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
